name: ICBCCS Credit and Convertible Bd Fd(LOF)
summary: ICBCCS Credit and Convertible Bd Fd(LOF) is a bond fund that invests in credit and convertible bonds and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to provide stable returns and capital appreciation through investments in high-quality debt instruments and convertible securities. It is managed by ICBCCS Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC) and Credit Suisse.
